creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Adam Weinberger from comment #3)

Please note that a PR without a patch doesn't have to be just an idea. It can also be:
* "The port is broken, crashes all the time"
* "The port has a security problem, please address"
* "The port is outdated, please update"

Maintainers have to respond to these.
